---
title: "Astray: A Tale of a Country Town. By Charlotte M. Yonge, Mary Bramston, Christabel Coleridge, Esmé Stuart."
---

## Astray: A Tale of a Country Town. By Charlotte M. Yonge, Mary Bramston, Christabel Coleridge, Esmé Stuart.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book 8vo 407pp

**Publisher:** London: Hatchards, Piccadilly. Serialized in<i> MP</i>, July 1885 to February 1886

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
